subject: docs/standards/interaction
initial_findings: One Apple source identifier in the coverage matrix did not resolve to the source manifest.
Apple spatial-layout and accessibility claims needed directly traceable official URLs.
Unity XRI boundary guidance needed a package-specific setup source rather than only the package overview.
resolved_before_pass: All eight source identifiers now resolve from the coverage matrix to the manifest.
Apple Gestures, Spatial Layout, and Accessibility URLs are recorded explicitly.
Unity XRI project setup is linked at the package guidance used for the boundary claim.
BindingSuggestionId and BindingSuggestion are explicit, inert, advisory concepts distinct from admitted routes and user overrides.
The Settings policy port remains an integration seam rather than a derivation source or package coupling.
final_checks: intent, context, route, source, and binding-suggestion identity separation
context priority and fail-closed equal-priority collision behavior
typed values, phases, capabilities, cancellation, outcomes, and ordered ingress
thin Unity Input System adapter and deferred XRI/OpenXR/device boundaries
testable stable identity, conflicts, capability mismatch, multimodal routing, and conversion
no compliance, maturity, release, renderer, runtime, or device evidence transfer
no consumer project or private material used as derivation input
non_claims: This advisory review is not an implementation review.
It grants no package maturity, release, compatibility, accessibility, comfort, platform, or device claim.
It does not replace exact-consumer or Device Lab evidence.
